data.title: Encryption Practices
data.description: Data encryption in transit and at rest to protect user privacy.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhanced security for user accounts with optional 2FA.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine evaluations and penetration tests to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Deploying both in-house and third-party audits.

data.title: Incident Response Strategy
data.description: A robust plan for responding to and mitigating security breaches.
data.technical_spec: Automated alerts, detailed incident logs, and recovery protocols.

data.title: User Data Protection
data.description: Strict policies and measures for securing user personal data.
data.technical_spec: Compliance with GDPR and CCPA standards.
